attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE
,FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
   ,NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL01_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL02_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL03_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL04_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL05_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL06_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL07_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL08_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL09_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL10_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL11_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL12_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL12_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL13_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL14_NAME
   ,NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE
   ,NODE_LEVEL15_NAME
   	,NODE_LEVEL01_ID_INT
	,NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT
	,NODE_LEVEL03_ID_INT
	,NODE_LEVEL04_ID_INT
	,NODE_LEVEL05_ID_INT
	,NODE_LEVEL06_ID_INT
	,NODE_LEVEL07_ID_INT
	,NODE_LEVEL08_ID_INT
	,NODE_LEVEL09_ID_INT
	,NODE_LEVEL10_ID_INT
	,NODE_LEVEL11_ID_INT
	,NODE_LEVEL12_ID_INT
	,NODE_LEVEL13_ID_INT
	,NODE_LEVEL14_ID_INT
	,NODE_LEVEL15_ID_INT
FROM 
(
 SELECT  
	SUBSTR(COALESCE (LEVEL20.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL19.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL18.NODE_VALUE,
LEVEL17.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL16.NODE_VALUE,
	LEVEL15.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL14.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL13.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL12.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL11.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL10.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL9.NODE_VALUE,
	LEVEL8.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL7.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL6.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL5.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL4.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL3.NODE_VALUE,
	LEVEL2.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL1.NODE_VALUE), 1,3) FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
	,SUBSTR(COALESCE (LEVEL20.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL19.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL18.NODE_VALUE,
LEVEL17.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL16.NODE_VALUE,
	LEVEL15.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL14.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL13.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL12.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL11.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL10.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL9.NODE_VALUE,
	LEVEL8.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL7.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL6.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL5.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL4.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL3.NODE_VALUE,
	LEVEL2.NODE_VALUE,LEVEL1.NODE_VALUE), 5,10) FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE
          ,LEVEL1.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL01_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL1.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL1.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL01_NAME
		   ,LEVEL2.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL2.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL2.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL02_NAME
		   ,LEVEL3.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL03_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL3.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL3.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL03_NAME
		   ,LEVEL4.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL04_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL4.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL4.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL04_NAME
		   ,LEVEL5.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL05_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL5.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL5.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL05_NAME
		   ,LEVEL6.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL06_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL6.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL6.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL06_NAME
		   ,LEVEL7.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL07_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL7.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL7.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL07_NAME
		   ,LEVEL8.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL08_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL8.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL8.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL08_NAME
		   ,LEVEL9.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL09_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL9.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL9.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL09_NAME
		   ,LEVEL10.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL10_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL10.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL10.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL10_NAME
		   ,LEVEL11.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL11_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL11.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL11.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL11_NAME
		   ,LEVEL12.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL12_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL12.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL12_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL12.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL12_NAME
		   ,LEVEL13.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL13_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL13.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL13.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL13_NAME
		   ,LEVEL14.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL14_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL14.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL14.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL14_NAME
		   ,LEVEL15.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL15_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL15.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL15.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL15_NAME	
		   ,LEVEL16.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL16_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL16.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL16_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL16.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL16_NAME
		   ,LEVEL17.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL17_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL17.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL17_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL17.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL17_NAME
		   ,LEVEL18.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL18_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL18.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL18_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL18.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL18_NAME
		   ,LEVEL19.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL19_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL19.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL19_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL19.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL19_NAME
		   ,LEVEL20.NODE_ID	AS NODE_LEVEL20_ID_INT
		   ,LEVEL20.NODE_VALUE 	AS NODE_LEVEL20_VALUE
		   ,LEVEL20.NODE_DESC  	AS NODE_LEVEL20_NAME
  FROM 
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=1) LEVEL1
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=2) LEVEL2
	ON LEVEL1.NODE_ID=LEVEL2.PARENT_NODE_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=3) LEVEL3
	ON LEVEL2.NODE_ID=LEVEL3.PARENT_NODE_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=4) LEVEL4
	ON LEVEL3.NODE_ID=LEVEL4.PARENT_NODE_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=5) LEVEL5
	ON LEVEL4.NODE_ID=LEVEL5.PARENT_NODE_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=6) LEVEL6
	ON LEVEL5.NODE_ID=LEVEL6.PARENT_NODE_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=7) LEVEL7
	ON LEVEL6.NODE_ID=LEVEL7.PARENT_NODE_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=8) LEVEL8
	ON LEVEL7.NODE_ID=LEVEL8.PARENT_NODE_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=9) LEVEL9
	ON LEVEL8.NODE_ID=LEVEL9.PARENT_NODE_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=10) LEVEL10
	ON LEVEL9.NODE_ID=LEVEL10.PARENT_NODE_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=11) LEVEL11
	ON LEVEL10.NODE_ID=LEVEL11.PARENT_NODE_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=12) LEVEL12
	ON LEVEL11.NODE_ID=LEVEL12.PARENT_NODE_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=13) LEVEL13
	ON LEVEL12.NODE_ID=LEVEL13.PARENT_NODE_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=14) LEVEL14
	ON LEVEL13.NODE_ID=LEVEL14.PARENT_NODE_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN  
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=15) LEVEL15
	ON LEVEL14.NODE_ID=LEVEL15.PARENT_NODE_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN  
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=16) LEVEL16
	ON LEVEL15.NODE_ID=LEVEL16.PARENT_NODE_ID
		LEFT OUTER JOIN  
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=17) LEVEL17
	ON LEVEL16.NODE_ID=LEVEL17.PARENT_NODE_ID
		LEFT OUTER JOIN  
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=18) LEVEL18
	ON LEVEL17.NODE_ID=LEVEL18.PARENT_NODE_ID
		LEFT OUTER JOIN  
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=19) LEVEL19
	ON LEVEL18.NODE_ID=LEVEL19.PARENT_NODE_ID
		LEFT OUTER JOIN  
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_AH_HIER_PUB_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=20) LEVEL20
	ON LEVEL19.NODE_ID=LEVEL20.PARENT_NODE_ID
) RMGMTH
WHERE  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AH_FINANCIAL_DEPT_H1 NFD
                    WHERE     NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE  =  RMGMTH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
                          AND NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE = RMGMTH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE 
                           )
and NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 from $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_MANAGEMENT_AH_HIERARCHY MAH
                    WHERE     MAH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE  =  RMGMTH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
                          AND MAH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE = RMGMTH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE 
                           )
